repositories.name: OnlineBookSales
repositories.description: This project named Online Book Sales - Backend deals with developing an e-commerce website for Online Book Sale. It provides the user with a catalog of different books available for purchase in the store. In order to facilitate online purchase, a shopping cart is provided to the user.

repositories.name: Tiffin_Fusion
repositories.description: Tiffin Fusion delivers fresh, nutritious meals blending traditional Indian flavors with modern twists. Perfect for students and professionals, we offer customizable, budget-friendly meal plans. Enjoy diverse, home-cooked dishes with the convenience of doorstep delivery, making every meal exciting and hassle-free.
